entries.note: V58-C reuses the shipped V58-B live restoration handoff and reintegration surfaces by default.
V58-C narrows the hardening target to the shipped observed-and-restored live harness-bound create_new exemplar only.
V58-C emits one advisory-only and candidate-only live harness hardening register without mutating live behavior by default.
V58-C derives hardening judgment from committed V56/V57/V58 lane artifacts before narrative interpretation.
V58-C keeps the recommendation function extensional and replayable: same selected evidence chain plus same frozen policy yields the same outcome.
V58-C keeps repeated observation/conformance/reintegration artifacts from the same bounded lineage non-independent for escalation support.
